title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Apollo Pharmacy

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Apollo Pharmacy
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Pharmacy is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Mysuru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Apollo Pharmacy:
Apollo Pharmacy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
